old.fallback: Collect The Caller'S Information And Notify The Emergency Dental Coordinator

new.fallback: Escalate The Situation To The Clinic Manager And Send An Urgent Message

old.failure_message: Collect The Caller'S Information And Notify The Emergency Dental Coordinator

new.failure_message: Escalate The Situation To The Clinic Manager And Send An Urgent Message

after_hours_flow_summary.old: After Hours Emergencies Are Routed To On-Call Dentist. If Unavailable, Collect The Caller'S Information And Notify The Emergency Dental Coordinator
after_hours_flow_summary.new: After Hours Emergencies Are Routed To Senior On-Call Dentist. If Unavailable, Escalate The Situation To The Clinic Manager And Send An Urgent Message
